# Read the text file content
path = "/mnt/data/file-FbVe8FMHuuDfschUR9ZKjn-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text

text = text
# Find all quoted spans between double quotes
indices = []
start = 0
while True:
    i = text.find('"', start)
    if i == -1:
        break
    j = text.find('"', i+1)
    if j == -1:
        break
    # Exclude the quotes; return [i+1, j)
    indices.append((i+1, j))
    start = j+1

indices, [text[s:e] for s,e in indices]

queries: وَسِيقَ الَّذِينَ اتَّقَوْا رَبَّهُمْ إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ زُمَرًا حَتَّى إِذَا جَاءُوهَا وَفُتِحَتْ أَبْوَابُهَا وَقَالَ لَهُمْ خَزَنَتُهَا سَلَامٌ عَلَيْكُمْ طِبْتُمْ فَادْخُلُوهَا خَالِدِينَ
وَنُفِخَ فِي الصُّورِ فَإِذَا هُمْ مِنَ الْأَجْدَاثِ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ يَنسِلُونَ
إذا دخل أهل الجنة الجنة يقول الله تبارك وتعالى تريدون شيئًا أزيدكم فيقولون ألم تبيض وجوهنا ألم تدخلنا الجنة وتنجنا من النار قال فيكشف الحجاب فما أعطوا شيئًا أحب إليهم من النظر إلى ربهم عز وجل
رواه مسلم إذا دخل أهل الجنة الجنة فيكشف الحجاب النظر إلى ربهم
وَسِيقَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوْا رَبَّهُمْ إِلَى ٱلْجَنَّةِ زُمَرًا
ونفخ في الصور فإذا هم من الأجداث إلى ربهم ينسلون يٰسٓ 51
سورة يس 51 ونفخ في الصور فإذا هم من الأجداث
Muslim إذا دخل أهل الجنة الجنة فيكشف الحجاب

output.code:
import json

text = text  # previously loaded

spans = [(142, 331), (379, 459), (517, 716)]
span_texts = [text[s:e] for s,e in spans]

citations = []

# 1st: Aya 39:73
citations.append({
    "span_start": spans[0][0],
    "span_end": spans[0][1],
    "span_text": span_texts[0],
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {
        "sura_name": "الزمر",
        "sura_number": 39,
        "aya_number": 73
    },
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "خطأ",
    "completely_invalid": True
})

# 2nd: Aya (but actually Yasin 36:51)
citations.append({
    "span_start": spans[1][0],
    "span_end": spans[1][1],
    "span_text": span_texts[1],
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {
        "sura_name": "يس",
        "sura_number": 36,
        "aya_number": 51
    },
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "خطأ",
    "completely_invalid": True
})

# 3rd: Hadith in Muslim
citations.append({
    "span_start": spans[2][0],
    "span_end": spans[2][1],
    "span_text": span_texts[2],
    "citation_type": "Hadeeth",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {},
    "hadeeth_reference": {
        "collection_name": "Sahih Muslim"
    },
    "corrected_text": "خطأ",
    "completely_invalid": True
})

output = {"citations": citations}
print(json.dumps(output, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":142,"span_end":331,"span_text":"وَسِيقَ الَّذِينَ اتَّقَوْا رَبَّهُمْ إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ زُمَرًا حَتَّى إِذَا جَاءُوهَا وَفُتِحَتْ أَبْوَابُهَا وَقَالَ لَهُمْ خَزَنَتُهَا سَلَامٌ عَلَيْكُمْ طِبْتُمْ فَادْخُلُوهَا خَالِدِينَ","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"الزمر","sura_number":39,"aya_number":73},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": ""  ,"book_number": 0 ,"hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true},{"span_start":379,"span_end":459,"span_text":"وَنُفِخَ فِي الصُّورِ فَإِذَا هُمْ مِنَ الْأَجْدَاثِ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ يَنسِلُونَ","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"يس","sura_number":36,"aya_number":51},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": ""  ,"book_number": 0 ,"hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true},{"span_start":517,"span_end":716,"span_text":"إذا دخل أهل الجنة الجنة، يقول الله تبارك وتعالى: تريدون شيئاً أزيدكم؟ فيقولون: ألم تبيض وجوهنا؟ ألم تدخلنا الجنة وتنجنا من النار؟ قال: فيكشف الحجاب، فما أعطوا شيئاً أحب إليهم من النظر إلى ربهم عز وجل","citation_type":"Hadeeth","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{  "sura_name": "" ,"sura_number": 0 ,"aya_number": 0 },"hadeeth_reference":{"collection_name":"Sahih Muslim"  ,"book_number": 0 ,"hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true}]}

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
